phrases.french: Le marché du Boulingrin, c'est quand ?
phrases.phonetic: luh mar-SHAY dew boo-lan-GRAN, say KON
phrases.context: The Marché du Boulingrin is held Saturday mornings in and around the famous Art Deco covered market hall — one of the finest in France.

phrases.french: La halle est classée monument historique ?
phrases.english: Is the market hall a listed historic monument?
phrases.phonetic: lah AL eh klas-SAY moh-new-MON ees-toh-REEK
phrases.context: The Halle du Boulingrin (1929) is an Art Deco masterpiece — a vast concrete shell structure listed as a historic monument. Worth visiting even when the market isn't on.

tips: Saturday morning market is the best time to visit Boulingrin — local producers, cheese, charcuterie, and champagne
The market hall itself (1929) is an architectural gem — a massive Art Deco concrete vault
Reims has one of the finest concentrations of Art Deco buildings in France, built during rapid post-WWI reconstruction
